name: torchtext (PyTorch NLP Data Utilities)

agent_readiness.notes: PyTorch NLP datasets and text transforms. from torchtext.datasets import AG_NEWS, SogouNews, DBpedia. train_iter, test_iter = AG_NEWS(). torchtext.transforms: SentencePieceTokenizer, BERTTokenizer, GPT2BPETokenizer, Truncate, PadTransform, ToTensor. torchtext.vocab: Vocab, build_vocab_from_iterator. from torchtext.data.utils import get_tokenizer. tokenizer = get_tokenizer('basic_english'). torchtext.functional: to_tensor, truncate, add_token. Datasets: IMDB, YelpReviewPolarity, YelpReviewFull, YahooAnswers, WikiText2, WikiText103, PennTreebank, Multi30k, IWSLT2017. Rust tokenizers via SentencePiece. Maintained but somewhat superseded by HuggingFace datasets+tokenizers.

gotchas: Legacy Field/TabularDataset API deprecated — use new functional API
HuggingFace datasets is often a better choice for NLP datasets
Documentation inconsistent between legacy and new API
best_when: PyTorch NLP workflows needing classic text datasets (AG_NEWS, IMDB, WikiText)
When SentencePiece or GPT2 BPE tokenizers are needed with PyTorch
Academic NLP benchmarks using standard torchtext datasets
avoid_when: General NLP data loading — HuggingFace datasets is more comprehensive
HuggingFace transformers workflows (use HF tokenizers directly)
When dataset is not in torchtext's built-in collection
summary: torchtext provides NLP datasets and text transforms for PyTorch. AG_NEWS(), IMDB(), WikiText2(). get_tokenizer('basic_english'). SentencePieceTokenizer, BERTTokenizer, GPT2BPETokenizer. torchtext.vocab.build_vocab_from_iterator(). BSD-3-Clause by Meta. Legacy Field API deprecated. HuggingFace datasets is more comprehensive for modern NLP. Best for classic benchmark datasets and PyTorch-native tokenization.
